overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r l} \mathcal {G} (b, a) & = \frac {\left( \begin{array}{c c} b & b \\ a & a \end{array} + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \cdots \\ a & a \end{array} \right) \left(1 + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \cdots \\ a & a \end{array} \right)}{\left(1 + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \cdots \\ a & a \end{array} \right)} \\ & = \left( \begin{array}{c c} b & b \\ a & a \end{array} + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \dots \\ a & a \end{array} \end{array} \end{array} \right) _ {\text {connected}} \end{array} \tag {13.17}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r l} \mathcal {G} (b, a) & = \frac {\left( \begin{array}{c c} b & b \\ a & a \end{array} + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \cdots \\ a & a \end{array} \right) \left(1 + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \cdots \\ a & a \end{array} \right)}{\left(1 + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \cdots \\ a & a \end{array} \right)} \\ & = \left( \begin{array}{c c} b & b \\ a & a \end{array} + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \begin{array}{c c} b & + \dots \\ a & a \end{array} \end{array} \end{array} \end{array} \right) _ {\text {connected}} \end{array} \tag {13.17}
